message:
test(doom/quake): add two-sided wall portal tests and Quake player extensions

Doom renderer (+708 lines):
- Add comprehensive tests for two-sided linedefs (portal walls) where
  adjacent sectors have different floor/ceiling heights, requiring both
  upper and lower wall segment rendering
- Build a complete two-room test map with front sector (floor=0, ceil=128)
  and back sector (floor=32, ceil=96) connected by a two-sided linedef
- Verify upper peg, lower peg, and middle transparent portal rendering
- Test BSP traversal through portal segs with correct sector attribution

Quake player (+136 lines):
- Extend player state machine and movement handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
